seoTitle: Gungalman vs Gunnedah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gungalman and Gunnedah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gungalman and Gunnedah.
heading: Gungalman vs Gunnedah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gungalman, New South Wales and Gunnedah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gungalman has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Gunnedah (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gungalman or Gunnedah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gungalman has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Gunnedah scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gungalman scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Gunnedah scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gungalman or Gunnedah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gungalman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
